paper_metadata.subject_name: Introduction to Industry 4.0 and Industrial Internet of Things

questions.question_text: Answer the following questions CO Mapping a What is a smart factory? Briefly explain how it leverages cyber-physical systems for efficient production processes. 2.5 b How can Augmented Reality improve industrial maintenance processes? Briefly explain its application. 2.5 c What is the function of sensors and actuators in Industrial IoT ? Briefly describe one example of how they are used in industrial automation. 2.5 d What is one benefit of adopting an IIoT business model for industries? Explain how it can improve decision-making in manufacturing. 2.5 e What is the role of data center networks in IIoT? Briefly explain how they support large-scale data processing in industrial applications. 2.5 f What is one security challenge in IIoT? Briefly explain one approach to addressing this challenge. 2.5 g What role does IIoT play in healthcare? Briefly explain how IoT devices improve patient monitoring and hospital management. 2.5 h How does Augmented Reality and Virtual Reality improve plant safety in industrial settings? Briefly explain one application. 2.5
Explain the concept of the Fourth Industrial Revolution. How does it differ from previous industrial revolutions, and what are the major technological innovations driving this transformation? 10
What is a LEAN production system? Explain the principles of LEAN manufacturing and how it contributes to efficiency, waste reduction, and continuous improvement in production processes. 10

Explain the IIoT Reference Architecture. Discuss the key layers and components of this architecture and how they facilitate communication and integration between various industrial systems and devices. 10

Explain the importance of cybersecurity in Industry 4.0. Discuss the key challenges that industries face in securing connected systems and data, and the technologies and strategies used to mitigate these risks. 10

Explain the concept of Software Defined Networks in the context of IIoT. Discuss the benefits of SDN for flexible network management, including improved scalability and efficient resource utilization in industrial networks. 10 2

What role does cloud computing play in Industrial IoT ? Discuss how cloud computing enables remote monitoring, data storage, and processing in IIoT systems, and explain its integration with fog computing for better latency and real-time decision-making. 10

Explain how UAVs are utilized to collect and transmit real-time data in industries like oil & gas, mining, and agriculture. What technologies facilitate their integration into IIoT systems? Also discuss the main benefits and challenges associated with deploying UAVs across different industrial sectors. 10
Explain how Industrial IoT is applied in the food industry. Discuss its role in optimizing production processes, ensuring food safety, and enabling traceability and monitoring in the supply chain. 10
